message:
style: apply rustfmt across 31 connectors

Reformat import ordering (NON_ALPHANUMERIC before utf8_percent_encode),
multi-line assert!/assert_eq! macro arguments, function signature line
breaks, match arm layout, and trailing whitespace. No semantic changes
to any connector logic.

Affected connectors: Algolia, BigQuery, Datadog, Google Sheets,
Grafana, HubSpot, iMessage, Mastodon, Mattermost, Microsoft365,
Mixpanel, Notion, PandaDoc, PostgreSQL, PostHog, Pulumi, Salesforce,
Semantic Scholar, Sentry, Snowflake, Square, Twitch, Twitter, WhatsApp,
and Zendesk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
